label: service (delivery of legal process)
pattern: InstanceSchema; physical delivery to a recipient (DO + TOUCH)
gloss: The formal legal act of delivering a writ or summons directly to the person concerned, thereby giving that person official notice of a court proceeding or required response.
notes: AST adequacy: lossy — the 65-prime inventory cannot express that the delivered thing is a writ or summons, nor its legal authority and binding-notice function; the AST renders a physical act bringing a thing into touch with its recipient.
